scheme_name: Sri Ram Janmabhoomi Shabari Smriti Yatra Sahay Scheme
page_title: Sri Ram Janmabhoomi Shabari Smriti Yatra Sahay Scheme

details: The scheme "Sri Ram Janmabhoomi Shabari Smriti Yatra Sahay Scheme" by the Industry and Mines Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to provide financial assistance to scheduled tribes and tribal communities for pilgrimage to Sri Ram Janmabhoomi in Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh, in memory of "Maa Shabari" and to enable darshan of Lord Sri Ram. The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹5,000/- per pilgrim and covers railway travel expenses through Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation Limited arrangements. The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat for twelve years or more and belong to the scheduled tribe or tribal community category. The scheme is implemented by the Gujarat Pavitra Yatradham Vikas Board. The applications for this scheme are accepted online through the official website of Gujarat Pavitra Yatradham Vikas Board, Gandhinagar.
benefits: ₹5,000/- per pilgrim as financial assistance towards travel expenses for pilgrimage to Sri Ram Janmabhoomi, Ayodhya.
Travel arrangements through the Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation Limited.
Railway journey assistance and booking support.
First 1,500 scheduled tribe and tribal pilgrims will be eligible for the scheme benefits.
Benefits are available once per person per year for the pilgrimage to Sri Ram Janmabhoomi, Ayodhya.
Pilgrims must complete the journey and submit proof of pilgrimage completion.
Travel must be undertaken within the approved timeframe after receiving permission.
Registration and prior approval from the Gujarat Pavitra Yatradham Vikas Board is mandatory.
Submission of travel documents and pilgrimage proof within one month of journey completion is required.
eligibility: The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat state for twelve years or more from the current age.
The applicant must belong to the scheduled tribe or tribal community category.
The applicant must be eligible for only one pilgrimage assistance per person per year to Sri Ram Janmabhoomi, Ayodhya.
The applicant must be above 12 years of age.
The applicant can include up to 8 family members in the group application.
The applicant must obtain prior approval from the Gujarat Pavitra Yatradham Vikas Board before undertaking the journey.
Priority will be given to the first 1,500 registered applicants from the scheduled tribe and tribal communities.

online: of the Gujarat Pavitra Yatradham Vikas Board. In the top ribbon, hover on "Booking" and click "Shree Ram Janmabhumi Registration". You will be taken to the
Complete the registration process by providing all the mandatory details: Name, Mobile Number, and Email. Create a password and confirm. Provide the captcha code and click "Submit".
Click on "Click Here to Login if Already Registered". You will be taken to the
. Provide your Username and Password. Click "Login".
The online application form for "Shree Ram JanmBhumi Yatra" will open. In the form, fill in all the mandatory fields and upload all the mandatory documents in the specified format and size.

Acknowledge the declaration by ticking the designated checkbox. Carefully review all the information provided and the documents uploaded. Make any necessary corrections. Click "Submit" to submit your application. You'll receive a confirmation message.
*Apply online before the deadline of 31st March of the respective year.
*Save and print the acknowledgment receipt or confirmation message containing the application reference number for future tracking and correspondence.

Wait for approval notification from Gujarat Pavitra Yatradham Vikas Board, Gandhinagar office, which will be communicated via post or through the online portal. Once approved, the board will provide detailed travel arrangements and booking confirmations for the pilgrimage journey.

Contact the Gujarat Pavitra Yatradham Vikas Board office at least 10 days before the intended travel date to coordinate final arrangements and receive travel instructions. Confirm accommodation arrangements and travel schedule as per the approved itinerary provided by the implementing board.

Undertake the pilgrimage journey as per the approved schedule and maintain all travel documents, including railway tickets, accommodation receipts, and capture required photographs at the temple premises. Follow all prescribed guidelines and temple regulations during the visit to Ayodhya.

Submit all travel proof documents, including railway tickets, accommodation receipts, and temple photographs to Gujarat Pavitra Yatradham Vikas Board office within one month of journey completion. Upload the required documentation through the official website portal for benefit processing and disbursement.
Office Address: Gujarat Pavitra Yatradham Vikas Board, Block 2 & 3, 1st Floor, Dr. Jivraj Mehta Bhavan, Gandhinagar - 382016.
For scheme-related queries and grievances, contact the above-mentioned office during working hours.

documents_required: Self-Attested Copy of Caste Certificate or Leaving Certificate establishing tribal status.
Self-Attested Copy of Bank Details (first page photocopy of passbook).
Self-Attested Copy of Age Proof Document.
Original Railway Tickets or Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation Limited tickets.
Accommodation Proof or Dharamshala Stay Receipts (if applicable).
2 to 3 Colored Photographs at Ayodhya Temple, including temple premises (selfies are accepted).
*Photocopies or unclear documents will not be accepted.
*Documents must be submitted within one month of journey completion.

faqs.question: What is the maximum amount of financial assistance I can receive per person for undertaking this pilgrimage journey to Ayodhya?
faqs.answer: You will receive ₹5,000 per pilgrim as financial assistance towards travel expenses for the pilgrimage to Ayodhya.

faqs.question: How many family members can I include in my group application when applying for this pilgrimage assistance scheme?
faqs.answer: You can include up to 8 family members in your group application for the pilgrimage journey.

faqs.question: What is the minimum age requirement I must meet to be eligible for financial assistance under this pilgrimage scheme?
faqs.answer: You must be above 12 years of age to be eligible for assistance under this scheme.

faqs.question: How long do I need to have been residing in Gujarat state to qualify for this pilgrimage financial assistance program?
faqs.answer: You must be a resident of Gujarat state for 12 years or more from your current age to be eligible for this scheme.

faqs.question: What specific community or caste category must I belong to in order to be eligible for this pilgrimage assistance?
faqs.answer: You must belong to the scheduled tribe or tribal community category to be eligible for financial assistance under this scheme.

faqs.question: How many times in a year can I apply for and receive financial assistance for pilgrimage to Ayodhya under this scheme?
faqs.answer: You are eligible for only one pilgrimage assistance per person per year to Sri Ram Janmabhoomi, Ayodhya under this scheme.

faqs.question: By what date must I complete and submit my online application to be considered for pilgrimage assistance in the current year?
faqs.answer: You must complete your online registration and application before the deadline of 31st March of the respective year.

faqs.question: What happens if I am among the later applicants and there are already many people who have applied before me?
faqs.answer: Priority will be given to the first 1,500 registered applicants from the scheduled tribe and tribal communities, so early application is important.

faqs.question: What type of photographs do I need to take and submit as proof of completing my pilgrimage journey to Ayodhya?
faqs.answer: You must submit 2 to 3 colored photographs taken at Ayodhya Temple, including temple premises, and selfies are accepted as valid proof.

faqs.question: What organization or agency will handle the railway booking and travel arrangements for my pilgrimage journey to Ayodhya?
faqs.answer: Travel arrangements will be made through the Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation Limited for your railway journey.

faqs.question: How much time do I have after completing my pilgrimage to submit all the required proof documents and travel receipts?
faqs.answer: You must submit all travel proof documents, railway tickets, accommodation receipts, and temple photographs within one month of journey completion.

faqs.question: What should I do at least 10 days before my intended travel date to ensure smooth coordination of my pilgrimage arrangements?
faqs.answer: You should contact the Gujarat Pavitra Yatradham Vikas Board office to coordinate final arrangements and receive detailed travel instructions for your approved journey.

faqs.question: What kind of medical certificate do I need to obtain and from which type of healthcare professional to prove my fitness for travel?
faqs.answer: You need to obtain a Medical Fitness Certificate from a Registered Medical Practitioner to demonstrate your fitness for the pilgrimage journey.
